column1: 彼は出て行ったなり、戻ってこない。
column2: かれはでていったなり、もどってこない。
column3: He went out and has not come back since.
column4: たなり・なり (while ~, remaining ~, not since ~)
column5: Verb[た] + なり / Verb[た] + きり
column6: describes a state that has continued unchanged since a particular action occurred; 'did X and has been in that state ever since'
column7: たなり: departure state continues unchanged to present
column8: たなり = state persists since action; たまま = remaining in state; てから = after doing; きり = just once and not since
